What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to your needs

🚛

24/7 Nationwide Hauling

Round-the-clock hauling service available nationwide. We ensure your shipments reach their destination on time, no matter the time of day.

❄️

Refrigerated Trucks

Chilled to sub-zero temperature & ambient trucks for sensitive cargo. Perfect for perishable goods, pharmaceuticals, and temperature-sensitive products.

📦

Single & Multiple Drops

Handle single and multiple deliveries from one city/province to another using 1 vehicle. Optimize your shipping costs with our flexible drop options.

📍

Real-Time Tracking

Monitor each delivery from pick-up point to destination. Get real-time truck location, estimated time of arrival, and temperature updates.

Nationwide Reach

Coverage Areas

Serving major regions across the Philippines

🗺️

Luzon

Manila, Metro Manila, Vigan, Tuguegarao, Tarlac, Pampanga, Daet, Naga, Legazpi, Sorsogon, and other provinces

🌊

Visayas

Tacloban, Iloilo, Bacolod, Dumaguete, Cebu, Tagbilaran, and other Visayas destinations

🌄

Mindanao

Davao, General Santos, Cotabato, Butuan, Iligan, Ozamis, Cagayan de Oro, Bukidnon, Pagadian, Dipolog, Zamboanga

Home › Services

Our Services

Comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to your needs

🚛

24/7 Nationwide Hauling

Round-the-clock hauling service available nationwide ensuring shipments reach their destination on time.

  • Available 24 hours, 7 days a week
  • Coverage across all major Philippine islands
  • Professional licensed drivers
  • GPS-tracked delivery
❄️

Refrigerated Trucks

Chilled to sub-zero temperature & ambient trucks for sensitive cargo including perishables and pharmaceuticals.

  • Sub-zero temperature capability
  • Ambient and chilled options
  • Real-time temperature monitoring
  • Ideal for food, pharma, and biotech
📦

Single & Multiple Drops

Handle single and multiple deliveries from one city/province to another using 1 vehicle.

  • Cost-effective consolidated shipping
  • City to city and inter-provincial
  • Flexible scheduling
  • Dedicated route planning
📍

Real-Time Tracking

Monitor each delivery from pick-up point to destination with live GPS and temperature updates.

  • Live GPS tracking
  • ETA notifications
  • Temperature log reports
  • Delivery confirmation alerts
🏭

Warehousing Solutions

Secure warehousing facilities with flexible storage options to meet your short-term and long-term needs.

  • Secure and monitored facilities
  • Short and long-term storage
  • Inventory management support
  • Staging and dispatch services
🤝

Customer Support

Our dedicated support team is always ready to assist you from booking to delivery.

  • 24/7 customer hotline
  • Dedicated account managers
  • Issue resolution within 24 hours
  • Post-delivery feedback support
Home › About Us

About LGL

Our story, our mission, our commitment to you

Who We Are

Built on Trust,
Driven by Reliability

LGL Trucking Services is a Filipino-owned logistics company established in 2023 with a mission to provide dependable, efficient, and professional trucking and hauling services across the Philippines. We are committed to delivering every cargo safely, on time, and with full transparency.

  • Serving Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao with a growing fleet of modern trucks
  • Offering refrigerated, ambient, and standard hauling solutions
  • Providing real-time tracking for every shipment
  • Building lasting partnerships with businesses of all sizes
  • Operating 24/7 to meet your logistics demands at any hour
2023
Established
3+
Regions
24/7
Operations
Our Values

What Drives Us

🎯

Mission

To provide the most reliable logistics and hauling services in the Philippines, connecting businesses to their markets efficiently.

🔭

Vision

To be the leading logistics partner in Southeast Asia, recognized for excellence, innovation, and integrity in every delivery.

💎

Integrity

We operate with full transparency and honesty. What we commit to, we deliver — no exceptions, no excuses.

🌱

Growth

We continuously invest in our fleet, technology, and team to grow alongside the needs of our valued clients.
